purpose: Emit a machine-verifiable certificate when replay-equivalence holds across independent implementations.
mutation_policy: Header dependencies are immutable. Body may expand without changing dependency references.
artifact_hash_rule: Hash canonical artifact excluding artifact_hash, then embed artifact_hash as final field.
validation_rule: Valid only when all implementations emit identical state_symbol and decision_hash under the same trace_hash, rule_set_hash, and semantic_contract_hash.
